65	// MinContextWindow returns the minimum context window the request requires,
66	// derived from EstimatedPromptTokens with a safety margin.
67	func (r Request) MinContextWindow() int {
68		if r.EstimatedPromptTokens <= 0 {
69			return 0
70		}
71		// 1.25x safety margin for response tokens + tool overhead.
72		return r.EstimatedPromptTokens + r.EstimatedPromptTokens/4
73	}

313	func (e *NoViableCandidateError) Error() string {
314		var pins []string
315		if e.Model != "" {
316			pins = append(pins, "model="+e.Model)
317		}
318		if e.Provider != "" {
319			pins = append(pins, "provider="+e.Provider)
320		}
321		if e.Harness != "" {
322			pins = append(pins, "harness="+e.Harness)
323		}
324		if e.MinPower > 0 {
325			pins = append(pins, fmt.Sprintf("min_power=%d", e.MinPower))
326		}
327		if e.MaxPower > 0 {
328			pins = append(pins, fmt.Sprintf("max_power=%d", e.MaxPower))
329		}
330		if len(pins) > 0 {
331			return fmt.Sprintf("no viable routing candidate for pins %s: %d candidates rejected", strings.Join(pins, " "), e.Rejected)
332		}
333		return fmt.Sprintf("no viable routing candidate: %d candidates rejected", e.Rejected)
334	}

356	// ErrNoLiveProvider reports that policy escalation walked the entire ladder
357	// (cheap → default → smart) without finding a live provider that
358	// can serve the request. Callers translate this into a precise user-facing
359	// message naming the prompt size and tool requirement so operators know
360	// what capability is missing across all policies.
361	type ErrNoLiveProvider struct {
362		// PromptTokens is the request's EstimatedPromptTokens at the time
363		// escalation began. Zero means no prompt-token gating was active.
364		PromptTokens int
365		// RequiresTools mirrors the request's RequiresTools flag.
366		RequiresTools bool
367		// StartingPolicy is the policy name that escalation began from.
368		StartingPolicy     string
369		MinPower           int
370		MaxPower           int
371		AllowLocal         bool
372		RejectedCandidates []CandidateRejection
373	}
374	
375	func (e *ErrNoLiveProvider) Error() string {
376		if len(e.RejectedCandidates) == 0 {
377			return fmt.Sprintf("no candidates match policy %q (power %d-%d, allow_local=%v); check policy fit and provider configuration",
378				e.StartingPolicy, e.MinPower, e.MaxPower, e.AllowLocal)
379		}
380		counts := map[string]int{}
381		for _, rejected := range e.RejectedCandidates {
382			counts[rejected.Reason]++
383		}
384		return fmt.Sprintf("policy %q has %d candidate(s) matching power %d-%d but all rejected: %d quota-exhausted, %d unhealthy, %d unavailable",
385			e.StartingPolicy,
386			len(e.RejectedCandidates),
387			e.MinPower,
388			e.MaxPower,
389			counts[string(CandidateRejectionQuotaExhausted)],
390			counts[string(CandidateRejectionUnhealthy)]+counts[string(CandidateRejectionHarnessUnhealthy)],
391			counts[string(CandidateRejectionModelUnavailable)])
392	}

516	// Resolve runs the engine end-to-end and returns a Decision.
517	//
518	// The engine:
519	//  1. Enumerates (harness, provider, model) candidates from inputs.
520	//  2. Applies gating (capability, override, model-pin, surface).
521	//  3. Scores per policy with cooldown demotion + perf bias.
522	//  4. Sorts viable → score → cost → locality → name.
523	//  5. Returns the top viable candidate with the full ranked list.
524	//
525	// Returns an error only when no viable candidate exists.
526	func Resolve(req Request, in Inputs) (*Decision, error) {
527		if in.Now.IsZero() {
528			in.Now = time.Now()
529		}
530		policyName, err := canonicalPolicy(req.Policy)
531		if err != nil {
532			return &Decision{}, err
533		}
534		req.Policy = policyName
535		if err := validateRequirements(req); err != nil {
536			return &Decision{}, err
537		}
538	
539		canonicalHarness := req.Harness
540		if canonicalHarness == "local" {
541			canonicalHarness = "fiz"
542		}
543		if err := explicitPinError(req, in); err != nil {
544			return &Decision{}, err
545		}
546	
547		var ranked []rankedCandidate
548		for _, h := range in.Harnesses {
549			// TestOnly harnesses (script/virtual) only reachable via explicit override.
550			if h.TestOnly && canonicalHarness != h.Name {
551				continue
552			}
553			// Automatic profile/tier routing is restricted to harnesses with full
554			// coverage. Explicit Harness pins can still use experimental/ad-hoc
555			// harnesses.
556			if canonicalHarness == "" && !h.AutoRoutingEligible {
557				continue
558			}
559			// Hard harness override: skip non-matching harnesses.
560			if canonicalHarness != "" && canonicalHarness != h.Name {
561				continue
562			}
563			entries := buildHarnessCandidates(h, req, in)
564			ranked = append(ranked, entries...)
565		}
566	
567		// Compute scores for candidates that survived the primary gates. A later
568		// max-power exclusion pass may turn some of these scored candidates
569		// ineligible so the trace can retain power evidence without letting an
570		// overpowered route win automatic selection.
571		for i := range ranked {
572			if !ranked[i].out.Eligible {
573				continue
574			}
575			ranked[i].out.Score = scorePolicy(req.Policy, ranked[i].internal)
576			ranked[i].out.ScoreComponents = scoreComponents(req.Policy, ranked[i].internal)
577			ranked[i].out.Reason = fmt.Sprintf("policy=%s; score=%.1f", req.Policy, ranked[i].out.Score)
578		}
579		applyMaxPowerExclusion(ranked, req)
580		neutralCost, hasKnownCost := neutralKnownCost(ranked)
581	
582		// Sort: eligible first, then descending score, then cost, then locality,
583		// then alphabetical.
584		sort.SliceStable(ranked, func(i, j int) bool {
585			ei, ej := ranked[i].out.Eligible, ranked[j].out.Eligible
586			if ei != ej {
587				return ei
588			}
589			if !ei {
590				return ranked[i].out.Harness < ranked[j].out.Harness
591			}
592			if ranked[i].out.Score != ranked[j].out.Score {
593				return ranked[i].out.Score > ranked[j].out.Score
594			}
595			if hasKnownCost {
596				ci := candidateCostTieValue(ranked[i], neutralCost)
597				cj := candidateCostTieValue(ranked[j], neutralCost)
598				if ci != cj {
599					return ci < cj
600				}
601			}
602			// Locality tiebreak: prefer local cost-class.
603			li := costClassRank[ranked[i].internal.CostClass] == 0
604			lj := costClassRank[ranked[j].internal.CostClass] == 0
605			if li != lj {
606				return li
607			}
608			if sameLocalEndpointGroup(ranked[i].internal, ranked[j].internal) {
609				if ranked[i].internal.EndpointSaturated != ranked[j].internal.EndpointSaturated {
610					return !ranked[i].internal.EndpointSaturated
611				}
612				if ranked[i].internal.EndpointLoad != ranked[j].internal.EndpointLoad {
613					return ranked[i].internal.EndpointLoad < ranked[j].internal.EndpointLoad
614				}
615			}
616			if ranked[i].out.Harness != ranked[j].out.Harness {
617				return ranked[i].out.Harness < ranked[j].out.Harness
618			}
619			return ranked[i].out.Provider < ranked[j].out.Provider
620		})
621	
622		out := make([]Candidate, len(ranked))
623		for i := range ranked {
624			out[i] = ranked[i].out
625		}
626	
627		for i := range out {
628			if out[i].Eligible {
629				return &Decision{
630					Harness:        out[i].Harness,
631					Provider:       out[i].Provider,
632					Endpoint:       out[i].Endpoint,
633					ServerInstance: out[i].ServerInstance,
634					Model:          out[i].Model,
635					Reason:         fmt.Sprintf("policy=%s; score=%.1f", req.Policy, out[i].Score),
636					Candidates:     out,
637				}, nil
638			}
639		}
640		if quotaErr := allProvidersQuotaExhaustedError(ranked); quotaErr != nil {
641			return &Decision{Candidates: out}, quotaErr
642		}
643		if requested := requestedModelIntent(req); requested != "" && req.Provider == "" && canonicalHarness == "" && hasLiveDiscoveryCandidates(ranked) {
644			return &Decision{Candidates: out}, fmt.Errorf("no live endpoint offers a match for %s", requested)
645		}
646		if missingRequirement := missingPolicyRequirement(req, out); missingRequirement != "" {
647			return &Decision{Candidates: out}, &ErrPolicyRequirementUnsatisfied{
648				Policy:      req.Policy,
649				Requirement: missingRequirement,
650				Rejected:    len(out),
651			}
652		}
653		return &Decision{Candidates: out}, noViableCandidateError(req, len(out))
654	}

702	// allProvidersQuotaExhaustedError returns ErrAllProvidersQuotaExhausted when
703	// at least one routing candidate was rejected solely because its provider is
704	// in the quota_exhausted state and no other candidate was eligible. The set
705	// of otherwise-eligible candidates collapses to those flagged with
706	// quotaExhaustedRetryAfter (the engine sets this only when the candidate
707	// passed every other gate). When that set is empty the existing
708	// no-viable / no-profile-candidate / live-discovery errors describe the
709	// failure more precisely.
710	func allProvidersQuotaExhaustedError(ranked []rankedCandidate) error {
711		var exhausted []string
712		seen := make(map[string]struct{})
713		var earliest time.Time
714		for _, c := range ranked {
715			if c.quotaExhaustedRetryAfter.IsZero() {
716				continue
717			}
718			name := c.out.Provider
719			if name == "" {
720				name = c.out.Harness
721			}
722			if _, dup := seen[name]; !dup {
723				seen[name] = struct{}{}
724				exhausted = append(exhausted, name)
725			}
726			if earliest.IsZero() || c.quotaExhaustedRetryAfter.Before(earliest) {
727				earliest = c.quotaExhaustedRetryAfter
728			}
729		}
730		if len(exhausted) == 0 {
731			return nil
732		}
733		return &ErrAllProvidersQuotaExhausted{
734			RetryAfter:         earliest,
735			ExhaustedProviders: exhausted,
736		}
737	}

775	func explicitPinError(req Request, in Inputs) error {
776		canonicalHarness := canonicalHarnessPin(req.Harness)
777		if requirement, attemptedPin := requirementPinConflict(req, in, canonicalHarness); requirement != "" {
778			return &ErrPolicyRequirementUnsatisfied{
779				Policy:       req.Policy,
780				Requirement:  requirement,
781				AttemptedPin: attemptedPin,
782			}
783		}
784	
785		if canonicalHarness != "" && req.Provider != "" && !harnessCanReachProvider(in.Harnesses, canonicalHarness, req.Provider) {
786			return &ErrUnsatisfiablePin{
787				Pin:    "harness=" + canonicalHarness + "+provider=" + req.Provider,
788				Reason: "provider is not reachable through harness",
789			}
790		}
791		if canonicalHarness != "" && req.Model != "" {
792			// Provider-routed subprocess harnesses can route any provider-pinned
793			// model (lmstudio, omlx, openrouter, etc.); the harness CLI owns
794			// concrete model validation in that case.
795			if providerRoutedHarnessAcceptsProviderPinnedModel(canonicalHarness) && req.Provider != "" {
796				return nil
797			}
798			h, ok := findHarness(in.Harnesses, canonicalHarness)
799			if ok && h.SupportedModels != nil && !harnessSupportsModel(h.SupportedModels, req.Model) {
800				return &ErrUnsatisfiablePin{
801					Pin:    "harness=" + canonicalHarness + "+model=" + req.Model,
802					Reason: "model is not supported by harness",
803				}
804			}
805			if ok && h.SupportedModels == nil && !harnessCanServeExactModel(h, req.Model) {
806				return &ErrUnsatisfiablePin{
807					Pin:    "harness=" + canonicalHarness + "+model=" + req.Model,
808					Reason: "model is not supported by harness",
809				}
810			}
811		}
812		if req.Provider != "" && req.Model != "" && !providerCanServeModel(in.Harnesses, canonicalHarness, req.Provider, req.Model) {
813			return &ErrUnsatisfiablePin{
814				Pin:    "provider=" + req.Provider + "+model=" + req.Model,
815				Reason: "model is not available on provider",
816			}
817		}
818		return nil
819	}

1042	// per (harness, provider, resolved-model) tuple.
1043	func buildHarnessCandidates(h HarnessEntry, req Request, in Inputs) []rankedCandidate {
1044		caps := Capabilities{
1045			SupportsTools:      h.SupportsTools,
1046			SupportedReasoning: h.SupportedReasoning,
1047			MaxReasoningTokens: h.MaxReasoningTokens,
1048			SupportedPerms:     h.SupportedPerms,
1049			ExactPinSupport:    h.ExactPinSupport,
1050			SupportedModels:    h.SupportedModels,
1051		}
1052	
1053		if !h.Available {
1054			return []rankedCandidate{{
1055				out: Candidate{
1056					Harness:      h.Name,
1057					CostSource:   CostSourceUnknown,
1058					Reason:       "harness not available",
1059					FilterReason: FilterReasonUnhealthy,
1060				},
1061				internal: candidateInternal{Harness: h.Name, CostClass: h.CostClass, CostSource: CostSourceUnknown},
1062			}}
1063		}
1064	
1065		histRate, hasHist := in.HistoricalSuccess[h.Name]
1066		if !hasHist {
1067			histRate = -1
1068		}
1069	
1070		// Enumerate providers. For harnesses with no providers (subprocess harnesses
1071		// with vendor-managed billing), emit a single virtual provider entry.
1072		providers := h.Providers
1073		if len(providers) == 0 {
1074			providers = []ProviderEntry{{Name: ""}}
1075		}
1076	
1077		out := make([]rankedCandidate, 0, len(providers))
1078		minCtx := req.MinContextWindow()
1079		stickyServerInstance := ""
1080		if req.CorrelationID != "" && in.StickyServerInstanceResolver != nil {
1081			stickyServerInstance, _ = in.StickyServerInstanceResolver(req.CorrelationID)
1082		}
1083		for _, p := range providers {
1084			models, reason := routingModelsForProvider(h, p, req, in)
1085			if len(models) == 0 {
1086				models = []string{""}
1087			}
1088			for _, model := range models {
1089				candidateReason := reason
1090				ctxWin := 0
1091				ctxSrc := ContextSourceUnknown
1092				if p.ContextWindows != nil {
1093					if v, ok := p.ContextWindows[model]; ok {
1094						ctxWin = v
1095					}
1096				}
1097				if ctxWin > 0 && p.ContextWindowSources != nil {
1098					if src, ok := p.ContextWindowSources[model]; ok && src != "" {
1099						ctxSrc = src
1100					}
1101				}
1102				if ctxWin == 0 && p.ContextWindow > 0 {
1103					ctxWin = p.ContextWindow
1104					if p.ContextWindowSource != "" {
1105						ctxSrc = p.ContextWindowSource
1106					}
1107				}
1108				if ctxWin == 0 && model != "" {
1109					ctxWin = 131072
1110					ctxSrc = ContextSourceDefault
1111				}
1112				if model == "" {
1113					ctxSrc = ContextSourceUnknown
1114				}
1115				entryCaps := caps
1116				entryCaps.ContextWindow = ctxWin
1117				entryCaps.SupportsTools = caps.SupportsTools || p.SupportsTools
1118				if p.SupportsToolsByModel != nil {
1119					if supported, ok := p.SupportsToolsByModel[model]; ok {
1120						entryCaps.SupportsTools = supported
1121					}
1122				}
1123				if len(p.DiscoveredIDs) > 0 {
1124					entryCaps.SupportedModels = nil
1125				}
1126	
1127				key := ProviderModelKey(p.Name, p.EndpointName, model)
1128				obs := in.ObservedSpeedTPS[key]
1129				if obs == 0 && p.EndpointName != "" {
1130					obs = in.ObservedSpeedTPS[ProviderModelKey(p.Name, "", model)]
1131				}
1132				providerSuccessRate := -1.0
1133				if rate, ok := in.ProviderSuccessRate[key]; ok {
1134					providerSuccessRate = rate
1135				} else if p.EndpointName != "" {
1136					if rate, ok := in.ProviderSuccessRate[ProviderModelKey(p.Name, "", model)]; ok {
1137						providerSuccessRate = rate
1138					}
1139				}
1140				latencyMS := in.ObservedLatencyMS[key]
1141				if latencyMS == 0 && p.EndpointName != "" {
1142					latencyMS = in.ObservedLatencyMS[ProviderModelKey(p.Name, "", model)]
1143				}
1144				power := candidatePower(in.ModelEligibility, model)
1145				endpointLoad := EndpointLoad{}
1146				if in.EndpointLoadResolver != nil {
1147					loadProvider, loadEndpoint := candidateLoadIdentity(h, p)
1148					if resolved, ok := in.EndpointLoadResolver(loadProvider, loadEndpoint, model); ok {
1149						endpointLoad = resolved
1150					}
1151				} else if load, ok := in.EndpointLoads[key]; ok {
1152					endpointLoad = load
1153				}
1154	
1155				gateReq := resolveRequestReasoning(req, h.Surface, in.ReasoningResolver)
1156				billingKind := candidateBillingKind(h, p)
1157	
1158				eligible := true
1159				var filterReason FilterReason
1160				if candidateReason == "" {
1161					// Subscription quota is a hard availability gate and must be
1162					// reported before catalog metadata gates. An exhausted Claude/Codex/
1163					// Gemini account is never a viable candidate, regardless of whether
1164					// the resolved model has complete power metadata.
1165					if h.IsSubscription && !h.SubscriptionOK {
1166						eligible = false
1167						candidateReason = h.QuotaReason
1168						if candidateReason == "" {
1169							if h.QuotaStale {
1170								candidateReason = "subscription quota unavailable"
1171							} else {
1172								candidateReason = "subscription quota exhausted"
1173							}
1174						}
1175						filterReason = FilterReasonUnhealthy
1176					} else if model != "" && len(entryCaps.SupportedModels) > 0 && !entryCaps.HasModel(model) {
1177						eligible = false
1178						candidateReason = "model not in harness allow-list"
1179						filterReason = FilterReasonScoredBelowTop
1180					} else if g, fr := CheckPowerEligibility(in.ModelEligibility, model, gateReq); g != "" {
1181						eligible = false
1182						candidateReason = g
1183						filterReason = fr
1184					} else if g, fr := CheckGating(entryCaps, gateReq); g != "" {
1185						eligible = false
1186						candidateReason = g
1187						filterReason = fr
1188					}
1189				} else {
1190					eligible = false
1191					// resolveModel rejection — model resolution is a capability
1192					// mismatch with no specific public category, so fall through
1193					// to the catch-all.
1194					filterReason = FilterReasonScoredBelowTop
1195				}

1197				// Hard preference filtering.
1198				if eligible {
1199					if !requestAllowsLocal(req) && candidateIsLocal(h, p) {
1200						eligible = false
1201						candidateReason = "policy disallows local candidates"
1202						filterReason = FilterReasonPolicyFiltered
1203					}
1204				}
1205				if eligible && requiresNoRemote(req) && !candidateIsLocal(h, p) {
1206					eligible = false
1207					candidateReason = "policy requires no_remote"
1208					filterReason = FilterReasonPolicyFiltered
1209				}
1210	
1211				if eligible {
1212					switch req.ProviderPreference {
1213					case ProviderPreferenceLocalOnly:
1214						if !h.IsLocal {
1215							eligible = false
1216							candidateReason = "preference is local-only"
1217							filterReason = FilterReasonUnhealthy
1218						}
1219					case ProviderPreferenceSubscriptionOnly:
1220						if !h.IsSubscription {
1221							eligible = false
1222							candidateReason = "preference is subscription-only"
1223							filterReason = FilterReasonUnhealthy
1224						}
1225					}
1226				}
1227	
1228				if eligible {
1229					if g, fr := CheckProviderDefaultEligibility(candidateProviderIdentity(h, p), p.ActualCashSpend, billingKind, p.ExcludeFromDefaultRouting, req); g != "" {
1230						eligible = false
1231						candidateReason = g
1232						filterReason = fr
1233					}
1234				}
1235	
1236				if eligible && req.Provider != "" && req.Provider != candidateProviderIdentity(h, p) {
1237					// Hard provider pin: reject every other provider identity, even
1238					// when a non-pinned candidate would otherwise score higher.
1239					eligible = false
1240					candidateReason = fmt.Sprintf("provider override requires %s", req.Provider)
1241					filterReason = FilterReasonPinMismatch

1243	
1244				// Caller-supplied exclusion list: skip candidates matching a caller
1245				// health hint. Records FilterReasonCallerExcluded so routing-quality

1554	// resolveModel picks the concrete model string for a (harness, provider) pair
1555	// given the request. Returns the model and a non-empty rejection reason if
1556	// resolution fails.
1557	func resolveModel(h HarnessEntry, p ProviderEntry, req Request, in Inputs) (string, string) {
1558		// 1. Exact pin.
1559		if req.Model != "" {
1560			// If the provider has discovery data, try fuzzy matching to map the
1561			// canonical/short ref to the provider-native ID.
1562			if len(p.DiscoveredIDs) > 0 {
1563				if matched := FuzzyMatch(req.Model, p.DiscoveredIDs); matched != "" {
1564					return matched, ""
1565				}
1566				return "", fmt.Sprintf("model %q not on provider %q", req.Model, p.Name)
1567			}
1568			if p.DiscoveryAttempted {
1569				return "", fmt.Sprintf("provider %q has no live discovered models", p.Name)
1570			}
1571			return req.Model, ""
1572		}
1573	
1574		// 2. Provider default → harness default. Empty default is acceptable
1575		// when no request fields constrained model selection — orphan validation
1576		// happens at dispatch time.
1577		if p.DefaultModel != "" {
1578			if len(p.DiscoveredIDs) > 0 {
1579				if matched := FuzzyMatch(p.DefaultModel, p.DiscoveredIDs); matched != "" {
1580					return matched, ""
1581				}
1582				return "", fmt.Sprintf("provider default %q not on provider %q", p.DefaultModel, p.Name)
1583			}
1584			return p.DefaultModel, ""
1585		}
1586		if h.DefaultModel != "" {
1587			return h.DefaultModel, ""
1588		}
1589		return "", ""
1590	}

1592	// EscalatePolicyAware is a helper for policy escalation. Given a request that
1593	// failed at one policy, return the next policy to try, restricted to those
1594	// that have a viable candidate under the current Inputs (i.e., the policy's
1595	// resolved concrete model exists on the request's pinned provider, if any).
1596	//
1597	// Fixes ddx-3c5ba7cc: tier escalation respects --provider affinity.
1598	//
1599	// Returns "" when no further policy is viable.
1600	func EscalatePolicyAware(current string, ladder []string, req Request, in Inputs) string {
1601		startIdx := -1
1602		for i, p := range ladder {
1603			if p == current {
1604				startIdx = i
1605				break
1606			}
1607		}
1608		if startIdx < 0 {
1609			return ""
1610		}
1611		for i := startIdx + 1; i < len(ladder); i++ {
1612			next := ladder[i]
1613			probe := req
1614			probe.Policy = next
1615			if dec, err := Resolve(probe, in); err == nil && dec != nil && dec.Harness != "" {
1616				return next
1617			}
1618		}
1619		return ""
1620	}
